thoughts.label: NVDA STOP-ZONE APPROACHING
thoughts.text: NVDA is at $194.54 AH — only 2.37% above its manual stop level of $190.04. Any gap-down at tomorrow's open could trigger an immediate manual sell. This is the highest-priority check at the 6 AM session.

thoughts.label: MU POST-EARNINGS SURGE
thoughts.text: MU's first post-earnings regular session delivered +15.74% — the AI memory demand repricing is real. AH profit-taking (-3.43%) is healthy consolidation, not reversal. Entry target zone ($1,050–$1,100) remains far below current price; no chase.

thoughts.label: TOMORROW'S ENTRY QUEUE
thoughts.text: Buying power is at zero — no AH trades possible today. 6 AM priorities: (1) NVDA stop check, (2) ARM Gate 2 reassessment in Pending Verdict, (3) RXRX + PANW + CRWD + NET gate evaluations, (4) queue entries when buying power opens.

thoughts.label: DELL GATE 2 BLOCKED
thoughts.text: GF Securities downgraded DELL Buy→Hold after a ~200% post-February rally. $1.56B insider selling over 3 months. AI server thesis intact but Gate 2 blocked — do not enter until valuation normalizes and insider selling ceases.

thoughts.label: ARM DEMOTED TO PENDING VERDICT
thoughts.text: ARM demoted from Predicted Victory. New Street Research downgraded Jun 18 (Buy→Neutral). Executive insiders selling coordinated multi-million dollar tranches through May-June. Trailing P/E ~431x vs industry ~24x. Fundamental AI inference CPU thesis is intact — waiting for Gate 2 to clear.

thoughts.text: IONQ has fallen -12.6% over two sessions in a sector-wide quantum computing rotation. Backlog $370M supports the thesis, but sustained selling warrants monitoring. A third 5%+ session would trigger a Private Signal Radar reassessment.

learned_patterns.pattern: MU earnings beat = semiconductor sector lift next session. 8 consecutive beats with accelerating magnitude. Q3 FY26 +24.3% beat → entire complex lifted next day (INTC +1.03%, MRVL +1.77%, AMD +2.49%).

Analyst downgrades after 200%+ rallies are high-conviction Gate 2 blockers — DELL post-200% run (-5.65%), ARM post-235% run (-23% from ATH). Valuation-based downgrades carry real weight even with intact fundamentals.
Retrace entry validated: MRVL gap-up >2% → gap-up rule applied → price retraced to $279.03 (within 2% of prior close) → market order executed. Do not chase gap-ups; set retrace target and wait.

Fractional positions cannot use conditional sell orders. Only market sells available. Manual monitoring at every session is the sole stop-loss mechanism — newly opened positions can approach their stop within one session.

Quantum computing stocks (IONQ, Rigetti, D-Wave) can decline 5-10% in a single session on macro risk-off rotation with no company-specific catalyst. Treat single-day moves as noise; multi-week trends warrant removal.
Insider selling at scale ($1B+ over 3 months, coordinated executive tranches) is a Gate 2 disqualifier — signals executives view current price as peak. Do not enter until selling subsides.

alerts.title: ARM Demoted to Pending Verdict
alerts.message: ARM moved from Predicted Victory to Pending Verdict. Gate 2 degraded: analyst downgrade (New Street Research, Jun 18), insider selling, 431x P/E. Fundamental AI inference thesis intact. Promote trigger: analyst upgrade or insider selling cessation.

alerts.title: DELL Gate 2 Blocked by Analyst Downgrade
alerts.message: GF Securities downgraded DELL from Buy to Hold after a ~200% rally. Insider selling $1.56B over 3 months. Entry Pipeline position held with Gate 2 blocked. Do not promote until resolved.

top_opportunities.thesis: ARM Holdings licenses the CPU architecture IP that powers every AI chip — inference chips, edge devices, mobile, datacenter. As AI inference demand explodes, every new ARM-licensed design generates royalty revenue growth. The stock is off -23% from its $444.8 all-time high, trading at $343 AH. Gate 2 is currently blocked (analyst downgrade, insider selling, 431x P/E), but this is the deepest pullback of the current cycle in the highest-conviction AI IP play. If Gate 2 clears at the 6 AM session, ARM becomes the top re-entry candidate.
top_opportunities.entry_target: ~$340-345 (current AH level; no gap-up concern from prior close of $359.08)
top_opportunities.action: Reassess Gate 2 at 6 AM. If analyst sentiment stabilizes and insider data improves, re-promote to Predicted Victory and queue market order when buying power is available.

top_opportunities.thesis: Recursion Pharmaceuticals uses AI to accelerate drug discovery — running millions of biological experiments simultaneously at scale impossible for human researchers. The NVIDIA partnership (GPU compute for molecular simulation) is direct private-market vector confirmation: NVDA invested because the AI drug discovery thesis is real and compute demand is massive. +3.87% today on no specific news. Sub-$4 price means even minimal buying power allows meaningful fractional entry.
top_opportunities.entry_target: ~$3.34 (AH price; viable with any non-zero buying power)
top_opportunities.action: Full 3-gate check at 6 AM. If all gates clear, queue market order — most accessible entry in the pipeline given price point.

top_opportunities.thesis: Palo Alto Networks is executing a platformization strategy — consolidating disparate enterprise security vendors into single unified PANW contracts. As AI expands the enterprise attack surface, security spend is mandatory and non-discretionary. PANW is capturing disproportionate share of that spend through forced consolidation deals. +2.74% today on no specific news. Gate check pending.
top_opportunities.action: Full 3-gate check at 6 AM. If gates clear, PANW advances to Predicted Victory and gets queued for next available buying power.
